markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy, LLM visibility, and sync cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Bi-weekly syncs approved** to enable deeper work and provide more substantial updates for internal reporting (e.g., QBRs).](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Listicles are a key growth driver,** boosting brand citation from 2% to a 3-4% target by owning the narrative and capturing direct traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**LLM visibility strategy defined:** Update source materials with `Outreach (aka outreach.io)` to disambiguate the brand from the common word, and proactively partner with publishers to increase citations.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
  - [**Content OS now uses a 1-3 business score** to prioritize product-aligned (score 3) content, ensuring focus on high-impact topics.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & LLM Visibility

  - [**Content OS Business Score:** A new system prioritizes content based on business impact:](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [**Score 3:** Directly related to a product capability.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [**Score 2:** Tied to the product but not a specific capability.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [**Score 1:** Adjacent topics for audience expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Listicles as a Growth Driver:**](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [**Problem:** Brand citation rate is 2%, while competitors are at 5-6%.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [**Why it matters:** Third-party listicles control the narrative and capture traffic. Creating owned listicles allows Outreach to control messaging and drive direct traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Action:** Prioritize the 5 existing listicle briefs to increase brand citation.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
      - [**Problem:** The brand name "Outreach" is a common word, causing LLMs to confuse the company with the action.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
      - [**Solution:** Update all source materials (blogs, G2, etc.) to `Outreach (aka outreach.io)` to disambiguate the brand.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
      - [**Action:** Partner with publishers to increase citations.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
          - [**Process:** Jo will provide a list of domains that cite Outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
          - [**Tiers:**](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
              - [**High-Reputation:** Consider paid placement.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
              - [**Mid-Tier:** Propose partnerships (e.g., guest posts).](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
              - [**Past Placements:** Update old PR with current messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)

### Scrunch & Fathom Strategy Update

  - [**Scrunch Audit & Prompt Reset:**](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [The initial 25 prompts were insufficient for Outreach's large platform.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [**New Plan:** Expand to 100+ prompts to cover the full funnel (awareness → decision).](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Megan's strategy team will provide a timeline next week.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [**Artifact Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [Jen is updating artifacts for review by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [**Goal:** Optimize for LLM token usage (context window limit \~200k tokens) to ensure concise, effective messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [A new "product matrix" artifact will be created for AI authors.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Analytics Discrepancy

  - [**Problem:** Significant data discrepancies exist between GA4 and Google Search Console (GSC).](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
      - [**Example:** A 4k+ user value is being excluded from analysis due to percentage misalignments.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [**Action:** Hadassah will sync with Andrew and Paul to investigate the tracking issue.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [**Interim Solution:** Jo will begin presenting GSC data to ensure more accurate click data.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

      - [Send the list of domains citing Outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [Share the Scrunch audit timeline next week.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Send updated artifacts for review by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Hadassah:**](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
      - [Share the LLM visibility strategy with Haley (Customer Advocacy) and the web team (Andrew, Paul).](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
      - [Sync with Andrew to investigate the GA4/GSC data discrepancy.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [**Maria:**](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [Review the 3 new articles and tag Jen with comments.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Transition to bi-weekly syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/MaJyTchSa1hKEX4FFHpJGwzrjvLCiNWZ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
